COMMENTS BREAKDOWN BY CATEGORY
================================================================================

[1] QUESTIONS (36% of auto-responses) → Auto-Respond with Templates
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Examples detected:
  ✓ "How do I get started with this? What tools do I need?"
  ✓ "What's the timeline for implementation? When can I start?"
  ✓ "What tools do I need to begin?"
  ✓ "How much does this cost?"
  
Response Template:
  "Thanks for asking! Here are some resources to help:
   • Visit our website for detailed guides
   • Check our FAQ section for common topics
   • Feel free to ask more specific questions!"

[2] PRAISE (44% of auto-responses) → Auto-Respond with Templates
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Examples detected:
  ✓ "This is absolutely amazing! So inspiring and well-explained. Thank you!"
  ✓ "Love the approach here! Really impressed with the quality. Great work!"
  ✓ "Incredible content! Changed my perspective entirely."
  
Response Template:
  "Thank you so much for the kind words! 🙏 We're thrilled you found value.
   Your support means everything to us!"

[3] SPAM (20% of total) → Log & Ignore (No Response)
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Examples detected:
  ✗ "BUY CRYPTO NOW!!! Limited offer, DM me for details on blockchain"
  ✗ "MLM opportunity - Start your own business TODAY!"
  ✗ "FREE MONEY just for clicking - Limited time offer"
  
Detection Pattern:
  • Crypto/blockchain terms: bitcoin, ethereum, NFT, web3
  • MLM keywords: network marketing, multi-level
  • Spam indicators: urgency, "limited time", "click here"
  • Emoji spam patterns: 💰, ♻️, 🔗

[4] SALES/PARTNERSHIPS (Immediate Manual Review Required)
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Examples detected:
  ! "Hi! Love your content. Would love to explore partnership opportunity."
  ! "Brand deal inquiry - interested in collaboration with your channel"
  ! "Sponsorship opportunity - let's discuss a potential partnership"
  
Flagging Criteria:
  • "partnership", "collaboration", "sponsorship", "brand deal"
  • "influencer opportunity", "affiliate", "promotion"
  • "business opportunity", "invest", "ROI discussion"

Action Required:
  → Review partnership inquiries manually
  → Respond with branded partnership response
  → Document all partnership proposals
  → Follow up within 24 hours

TRANSITION TO LIVE MODE
================================================================================
When ready to monitor actual YouTube comments:

1. Obtain YouTube OAuth2 credentials (youtube_credentials.json)
2. Run: python3 .cache/setup-youtube-cron.py
3. Update mode from "demo" to "live" in config
4. Test with: python3 .cache/youtube-comment-monitor.py
5. Verify first 5 cycles manually
6. Monitor error logs for API issues
7. Adjust response templates based on real comments

Notes:
- Demo mode uses simulated comments for testing
- Live mode connects to real YouTube API
- All categorization logic transfers directly
- No changes needed to cron job scheduling
